problem id: 0cb88778
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00101100 -> 10000101
  00100100 -> 10000100
  10110000 -> 00010110
  11011111 -> 00111011
  11010111 -> 00111010
  11111101 -> 10111111
  10010011 -> 00110010
  01001001 -> 00101001
  01000110 -> 01001000
  10110010 -> 01010110

query: 10000111
predicted answer: 00110000
